source: CRPT-118srpt207, Labor-HHS-Education explanatory statement for BILLS-118s4942rs
note: Labor-HHS-Education FY 2025 (Reported in Senate) account amounts, extracted from the committee report's 3-line summary blocks (committee-recommendation amounts, in actual dollars) and validated against the bill XML. `match_path` is the mapped bill node when the account name resolves uniquely (strict node-level check); null otherwise, where the test falls back to agency-scoped recall via `title`. External ground truth for GitHub #8. Regenerate with scripts/build_validation.py.
